hero.subtitle: The South Bohemian Cyber Security Center provides central protection for organizations established by the South Bohemian Region.

onas.title: Who We Are
onas.aboutText1: The South Bohemian Cyber Security Center Ltd. was established by a decision of the South Bohemian Regional Assembly to help as a service organization ensure the security of operations, IT infrastructure, and information for organizations established by the region. Not only the regional office itself, but especially healthcare facilities (hospitals, emergency services) will thus be able to use the center's support in eliminating cyber threats that could paralyze their operations or lead to the loss of important data.
onas.aboutText2: Advancing digitalization brings greater vulnerability to entities operating IT systems. Serious cyber attacks often occur, causing extensive damage to the attacked organizations. Their remediation requires significant financial costs and, above all, a long time needed to resolve functional problems caused by the attack. During this time, the organization's operations may be significantly limited. As mentioned above, digital technologies are increasingly used by organizations such as hospitals or emergency medical services.
onas.aboutText3: In connection with the transposition of the European NIS2 directive (which is an updated version of the NIS directive - Network and Information Security from 2016) into Czech legislation, there will be an expansion in the number of organizations that will have the obligation to introduce new organizational, procedural, and technical measures. These organizations with new obligations in the field of cyber security will also include the aforementioned regional entities (hospitals, emergency services, and others). All these measures will require not only significant financial but especially personnel costs.
onas.aboutText4: The South Bohemian Cyber Security Center, by concentrating experts in the field of cybersecurity in one place, will help with the organizational and procedural implementation of the requirements of the NIS2 directive. At the same time, it will cooperate on the technical security of individual subjects, resolve individual threats, and contribute to more effective security of the affected organizations in cyberspace through available tools.
onas.visionText: To be the main partner for the South Bohemian Region and its municipalities in the fight against digital threats and to create a secure cyber ecosystem for citizens.
onas.teamText: We consist of certified security experts, ethical hackers, and experienced analysts with years of practice in protecting critical infrastructure.

gdpr.title: Privacy Policy (GDPR)
gdpr.p1: The South Bohemian Cyber Security Center Ltd. (JCKB) processes personal data in accordance with Regulation (EU) 2016/679 of the European Parliament and of the Council (GDPR).
gdpr.purposeText: We process personal data primarily for communication with potential partners, handling inquiries, and ensuring the security of our services.
gdpr.rightsText: You have the right to access, rectify, or erase your data, restrict processing, and the right to object to processing.
gdpr.contactText: To exercise your rights, please contact us at: info@jckb.cz

cookies.title: Cookie Policy
cookies.p1: This website uses only necessary technical cookies required for proper site functionality and security.
cookies.p2: We do not use any third-party advertising or tracking cookies without your explicit consent.
cookies.settingsText: You can change your preferences at any time in the privacy settings in the bottom left corner of the screen.

mandatory.title: Mandatory Information
mandatory.regValue: C 35116 at the Regional Court in České Budějovice

jobs.title: We're Hiring!
jobs.subtitle: Interested in modern security tech? We're looking for IT specialists for the new regional SOC.

career.title: Careers at
career.subtitle: Join a team of cyber security experts. We help protect the digital infrastructure of the South Bohemian Region against modern threats.

items.title: Cybersecurity Manager
tasks: Ensure information security management system in organizations established by the South Bohemian Region.
Perform the role of Cybersecurity Manager.
Create and implement security strategy and participate in risk identification and assessment processes.
Monitor current security threats and prepare Business Continuity Management.
Organize cybersecurity committees.
Ensure compliance with regulatory requirements (especially NIS2, GDPR, internal laws).
Incident management and crisis response.
Participate in raising cybersecurity awareness and catching up with current trends.
Travel and attend meetings in managed organizations.
expected: University degree and at least 2 years of experience in cybersecurity (or High School and 5 years experience).
Knowledge of security standards (e.g. ISO 27001, NIS2, GDPR).
Knowledge related to effective deployment and operation of technical security solutions.
Ability to identify, analyze and manage security risks.
Strong communication and organizational skills, ability to lead a team and manage projects.
Relevant cybersecurity certifications are an advantage.
Active driver (Category B license).
Clean criminal record.
offer: Work on interesting projects influencing the quality of medical care provision in the region.
Interesting work in a cybersecurity company.
Opportunity to gain new experience, space for self-realization.
Opportunities for professional education and personal development.
A friendly and supportive team striving for success.
Fair and decent treatment.
High-quality equipment for problem-free work performance.
Corporate package of benefits.
Salary matching the candidate's skills and experience.
benefits: Further education, courses and relevant certifications

items.title: IT Specialist Junior/Senior
tasks: Installation and administration of user computers (Windows) and corporate hardware.
Securing the IT environment.
Administration, installation and reconfiguration of networks and network elements.
Installation, configuration, backups, administration and implementation of service requests.
Administration of services and VMs in MS Azure and vCloud Director cloud platforms.
Creation of project operational documentation.
Close cooperation with the operations manager.
expected: Completed secondary education and experience in the field
Knowledge of the Czech language
Clean criminal record
bonus: Knowledge of TCP/IP protocol and networks.
Installation and administration of Linux and Windows servers.
Knowledge of cybersecurity and SOC Operations.
offer: Work on interesting projects in the South Bohemian Region.
Interesting work in a company focused on cybersecurity.
Opportunities for professional growth.
Friendly and supportive team.
High-quality hardware equipment.
Competitive salary matching skills and experience.

items.title: SOC Lead
tasks: Crucial participation in building the Security Operations Center (SOC).
Leading personnel selection of suitable candidates.
Responsible for leading and developing the team of SOC analysts.
Managing detection, analysis, and responses to cyber incidents.
Defining detection rules, automation playbooks, and incident response processes.
Communicating with national CERT and ensuring SOC operations per NIS2.
Configuring and optimizing monitoring and incident response processes.
Designing and optimizing SOC architecture (SIEM, SOAR, TI, log management, EDR, XDR).
expected: Experience building a SOC and leading a team.
Cybersecurity practice and experience.
Experience in IT security architecture, automation, and Threat Intelligence.
Knowledge of SOC principles, SIEM, SOAR, EDR, IDS/IPS, CTI and tools.
Practical knowledge of SIEM solutions.
Good organizational skills and decision-making under pressure.
Orientation in standards (ISO 27001, NIST, MITRE ATT&CK).
Communicative level of English.
offer: Work on strategic projects impacting medical and regional care.
Engaging work in cybersecurity with great facilities.
Space for self-realization and personal growth.

items.title: IT Network Specialist
tasks: Manage and maintain corporate network infrastructure (switches, routers, firewalls).
Configure and optimize network security elements.
Participate in designing and implementing network solutions.
Monitor network traffic, evaluate incidents, improve cybersecurity.
Collaborate on ensuring smooth corporate services operations.
Create technical and operational documentation.
expected: High school degree and practical experience in network administration.
Experience with TCP/IP, VLAN, routing, switching, VPN, 802.1X.
Configuration of firewalls and overview of security principles.
Czech language skills and clean criminal record.
bonus: Basics of Linux and Windows servers administration, network diagnostics.
Overview of segmentation, IDS/IPS, Zero Trust.
Certifications such as Fortinet NSE, CCNA, or CompTIA.
offer: Work in a strong team focused on public administration systems security.
High-quality IT equipment.

items.title: M365 Administrator / IT Specialist
tasks: Comprehensive administration of Microsoft 365 / Entra ID (Azure AD) tenant.
Management of user accounts, groups, roles, domains, DNS records, and licenses.
Configuration of MFA, SSPR, Conditional Access, Identity Protection.
Administration and configuration of Entra Connect / Cloud Sync.
Full Intune administration including MDM / MAM policies.
Configuration of Autopilot, Enrollment, and Compliance policies.
Creating configuration profiles (BitLocker, Wi-Fi, VPN).
Onboarding automation (Intune + Power Automate).
expected: Experience with Microsoft 365 / Entra ID / Intune administration (min. 2 years).
Completed secondary education and field experience.
Czech language skills and clean criminal record.
bonus: Ability to write PowerShell scripts, Graph API
Understanding of Microsoft Sentinel and Log Analytics
offer: Opportunity to grow with technology in a secure and stable environment.

news.title: News and Threats
news.subtitle: Overview of the latest security events and warnings issued by JCKB.

items.title: Elevated Risk of Phishing Attacks in the Region
items.desc: We have registered widespread dispatch of fraudulent emails with the subject 'Urgere: System Update 0x4B'. We recommend maximum vigilance and not clicking on unknown links.

items.title: New NIS2 Directive: How to Prepare
items.desc: We have prepared a comprehensive methodology for municipal representatives to implement the new European NIS2 directive. Download the manual or attend our webinar.

items.title: Training: Cyber Hygiene Basics
items.desc: JCKB is organizing a one-day seminar for regional authority employees focused on the basics of safe internet browsing and personal data handling.
